interfaces.name: getHomeOverview
interfaces.description: Get content needed to render the homepage, including featured practice areas, services, and legal tools.

interfaces.name: getPracticeAreasOverview
interfaces.description: List all active practice areas for the Practice Areas overview page.

interfaces.name: getPracticeAreaDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific practice area, including its services.

parameters.name: practice_area_key
parameters.description: Practice area key, e.g., 'family_law', 'employment_law', 'estate_planning'

recommended_cta_label.description: Suggested CTA label for this practice area, e.g., 'Customize Your Estate Plan'

interfaces.name: getServiceDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific legal service, including pricing metadata and whether a fee estimator is available.

parameters.name: service_id
parameters.description: Service id from the URL or service card click.

interfaces.name: getServiceFeeEstimatorConfig
interfaces.description: Get configuration options for the fee estimator associated with a given service (e.g., states, children options, property complexity options).

parameters.name: service_id
parameters.description: Service id whose fee estimator configuration is requested.

interfaces.name: calculateServiceFeeEstimate
interfaces.description: Calculate an estimated fee for a given service based on user inputs and record the estimate.

parameters.name: service_id
parameters.description: Service id being estimated.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: State in which the matter will be handled, e.g., 'California'.

parameters.name: children_option
parameters.description: Children option value, e.g., 'no_minor_children', 'with_minor_children'.

parameters.name: property_complexity
parameters.description: Property complexity, e.g., 'no_contested_property', 'contested_property', 'complex_property'.

parameters.name: max_budget
parameters.description: Maximum budget the user has for this service.

message.description: User-friendly summary explaining whether the estimate is within budget.

interfaces.name: getLawyerSearchFilters
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for the lawyer & consultation search page.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Context in which filters are used, e.g., 'our_lawyers' or 'consultation'.

interfaces.name: searchLawyers
interfaces.description: Search and list lawyers based on filters like practice area, office location, consultation type, hourly rate, and rating.

parameters.name: practice_area_key
parameters.description: Filter by practice area key, e.g., 'employment_law', 'business_law'.

parameters.name: office_id
parameters.description: Filter by primary office.

parameters.name: consultation_type
parameters.description: Filter by consultation type, e.g., 'phone', 'video', 'in_person'.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Search context, e.g., 'our_lawyers' browse mode or 'consultation' booking mode.

parameters.name: max_hourly_rate
parameters.description: Maximum hourly rate filter.

parameters.name: min_rating
parameters.description: Minimum rating filter (e.g., 4.5).

parameters.name: require_free_consultation
parameters.description: If true, only return lawyers who offer at least one free consultation slot.

parameters.name: min_free_consultation_minutes
parameters.description: Minimum duration in minutes for a free consultation slot, e.g., 20.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort order, e.g., 'hourly_rate_asc', 'hourly_rate_desc', 'rating_desc', 'experience_desc'.

interfaces.name: getLawyerProfile
interfaces.description: Get detailed information about a specific lawyer for the profile and booking page.

parameters.name: lawyer_id
parameters.description: Lawyer id from the profile URL or card click.

interfaces.name: getLawyerAvailability
interfaces.description: Get upcoming availability slots for a specific lawyer, optionally filtered by consultation type and date range.

parameters.name: lawyer_id
parameters.description: Lawyer whose availability is being requested.

parameters.name: consultation_type
parameters.description: Restrict to a specific consultation type, e.g., 'phone'.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date (inclusive) in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date (inclusive) in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.

interfaces.name: createConsultationBooking
interfaces.description: Create a consultation booking for a selected lawyer and availability slot.

parameters.name: lawyer_id
parameters.description: Lawyer for whom the consultation is being booked.

parameters.name: availability_slot_id
parameters.description: Selected availability slot id to be booked.

parameters.name: consultation_type
parameters.description: Type of consultation, e.g., 'phone', 'video', 'in_person'.

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Optional notes from the client about the matter.

interfaces.name: addLawyerToShortlist
interfaces.description: Add a lawyer to the single-user shortlist for later reference and comparison.

parameters.name: lawyer_id
parameters.description: Lawyer id to add to the shortlist.

interfaces.name: getLawyerShortlist
interfaces.description: Get the current single-user shortlist of saved lawyers along with basic profile data for display.

interfaces.name: getArticleSearchFilters
interfaces.description: Get available filters and sort options for the Resources & Articles page.

interfaces.name: searchArticles
interfaces.description: Search articles and related content by keyword, topic, time range, and sort order.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Free-text search query, e.g., 'non-compete agreement'.

parameters.name: topic
parameters.description: Filter by topic, e.g., 'employment_law', 'business_law', 'general'.

parameters.name: time_range
parameters.description: Time filter, e.g., 'last_30_days', 'last_12_months', 'all_time'.

parameters.name: sort_order
parameters.description: Sort order, e.g., 'most_recent', 'oldest_first', 'relevance'.

parameters.name: content_type
parameters.description: Content type to search, e.g., 'articles', 'guides', 'faqs'.

interfaces.name: getArticleDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific article, including related articles.

parameters.name: article_id
parameters.description: Article id from the URL or article card click.

interfaces.name: saveArticleToReadingList
interfaces.description: Save or bookmark an article to the single-user reading list.

parameters.name: article_id
parameters.description: Article id to save.

interfaces.name: getReadingList
interfaces.description: Get the current reading list and article details for display.

interfaces.name: getEstatePackageBuilderConfig
interfaces.description: Get configuration for the estate package builder including available documents, add-ons, client types, and any state-specific notes.

interfaces.name: createOrUpdateEstatePackage
interfaces.description: Create or update the in-progress estate planning package with selected documents, add-ons, client type, and state, and calculate the total price.

parameters.name: client_type
parameters.description: Client type, e.g., 'individual' or 'couple'.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: State in which the estate plan will apply, e.g., 'Texas'.

parameters.name: selected_document_ids
parameters.description: Array of selected EstateDocumentTemplate ids.

parameters.name: selected_add_on_ids
parameters.description: Array of selected EstateAddOnOption ids.

parameters.name: max_budget
parameters.description: Optional budget cap to check against the calculated total, e.g., 1000.

within_budget.description: True if max_budget is provided and total_price is less than or equal to it.

budget_message.description: User-friendly message indicating whether the package fits within budget.

interfaces.name: getEstatePackageSummary
interfaces.description: Get the current estate package summary including resolved document and add-on details for the summary page.

interfaces.name: finalizeEstatePackageQuote
interfaces.description: Finalize the current estate package quote, optionally label it, and mark it as saved or submitted without taking payment.

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Optional label to identify this package quote, e.g., 'Texas Individual Plan'.

parameters.name: submit
parameters.description: If true, mark the package as 'submitted'; otherwise mark as 'saved'.

interfaces.name: getContactFormOptions
interfaces.description: Get options for the structured contact inquiry form (issue types, user roles, preferred contact methods, states).

interfaces.name: submitContactInquiry
interfaces.description: Submit a structured contact inquiry to the firm.

parameters.name: type_of_issue
parameters.description: Issue type, e.g., 'landlord_tenant_dispute', 'employment_law_issue'.

parameters.name: user_role
parameters.description: User role, e.g., 'tenant', 'landlord', 'individual', 'business'.

parameters.name: amount_in_dispute
parameters.description: Amount involved in the dispute, if applicable.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: State where the issue arises, e.g., 'New York'.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Free-text description of the issue.

parameters.name: preferred_contact_method
parameters.description: Preferred contact method, e.g., 'email' or 'phone'.

interfaces.name: searchOffices
interfaces.description: Search for nearby offices based on a ZIP code or address, with optional radius and weekend hours filters.

parameters.name: origin_input
parameters.description: ZIP code or address entered by the user, e.g., '94103'.

parameters.name: distance_radius_miles
parameters.description: Search radius in miles, e.g., 10.

parameters.name: has_weekend_hours
parameters.description: If true, only return offices with weekend hours.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort order, e.g., 'distance_nearest_first'.

interfaces.name: getOfficeDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific office, including hours and contact info.

parameters.name: office_id
parameters.description: Office id from the locations search or card click.

interfaces.name: getOfficeDirections
interfaces.description: Generate directions from a user-provided origin to a specific office and provide a printable view.

parameters.name: office_id
parameters.description: Destination office id.

parameters.name: origin_input
parameters.description: Origin ZIP code or address, e.g., '94103'.

interfaces.name: getLegalToolsOverview
interfaces.description: List available self-help tools and calculators for the Legal Tools overview page and for homepage quick links.

interfaces.name: getNdaGeneratorConfig
interfaces.description: Get configuration options and defaults for the NDA generator, including supported NDA types, states, and default term lengths.

interfaces.name: createOrUpdateNdaDraft
interfaces.description: Create or update a single-user NDA draft based on input parameters and generate an HTML preview.

parameters.name: nda_type
parameters.description: NDA type, e.g., 'mutual_nda' or 'unilateral_nda'.

parameters.name: party_1_name
parameters.description: Name of the first party, e.g., 'BrightApps LLC'.

parameters.name: party_2_name
parameters.description: Name of the second party, e.g., 'DataCore Inc.'.

parameters.name: governing_law_state
parameters.description: State whose law governs the NDA, e.g., 'California'.

parameters.name: term_years
parameters.description: Length of the confidentiality obligation in years, e.g., 3.

parameters.name: include_non_solicitation_clause
parameters.description: Whether to include a non-solicitation clause.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get structured content for the About page including firm history, mission, and key attorneys.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyPolicyContent
interfaces.description: Get the Privacy Policy content for display.

interfaces.name: getTermsOfUseContent
interfaces.description: Get the Terms of Use content for display.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateLawyerShortlist
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve the current single-user lawyer shortlist from storage or create a new one if none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateReadingList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve or initialize the single-user article reading list.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateEstatePackage
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to fetch the in-progress estate package or create a new draft package.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateEstatePackageTotal
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to calculate the total price of an estate package from selected documents and add-ons.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateServiceFeeEstimate
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute a service fee estimate using service configuration and user input.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateNdaDraft
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to fetch or initialize a single-user NDA draft context for the NDA generator.

helperFunctions.name: _reserveAvailabilitySlot
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to atomically reserve an availability slot when creating a consultation booking.

helperFunctions.name: _geocodeOriginAndComputeDistances
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to geocode the user's origin input and calculate distances to offices for the locations search.
